content.body: Domenic hsivonen: I've now rebased https://github.com/whatwg/url/pull/905 and this changes the IDNA section a bit more. Notably the domain parser now handles all validation errors upfront (so we always report beStrict=true validation errors, despite parsing as beStrict=false), making the remainder of the code easier to read. There's no longer an as-nice early return for beStrict=true, but I've tried to compensate for it with the strictResult variable name.
content.formatted_body: Domenic hsivonen: I've now rebased https://github.com/whatwg/url/pull/905 and this changes the IDNA section a bit more. Notably the domain parser now handles all validation errors upfront (so we always report beStrict=true validation errors, despite parsing as beStrict=false), making the remainder of the code easier to read. There's no longer an as-nice early return for beStrict=true, but I've tried to compensate for it with the strictResult variable name.

content.body: Hopefully that's the last change in this area for a while.
wonders if nicolo-ribaudo wants to become editor of Web IDL
content.formatted_body: wonders if nicolo-ribaudo wants to become editor of Web IDL

content.body: Meanwhile, maybe Ms2ger can stamp https://github.com/whatwg/webidl/pull/1612 then
